channel.title: Rolling-Blackouts-Coastal-Fever on smpaget blog
channel.description: Recent content in Rolling-Blackouts-Coastal-Fever on smpaget blog

item.title: "The Best 0f 2020" from Laconic Hegemony, side A (vol 17) & side B (vol 18), a #mixtape for you.
item.description: The new Laconic Hegemony mixtape is now out. Laconic Hegemony is a small mixtape I put out with my favourite songs of the past year annually. You can listen to all, some or none of it. It is your choice. All these songs have been songs which have accompanied me over 2020 and mean something to me in some way, (and I should point out, 2020 what a year it has been). I am aware they do not currently mean anything to you, hopefully that can change. Think of it as two sides of musical goodness to accompany your work, rest and play! If you are so inclined, let me know what you like from the mixtapes. https://www.mixcloud.com/sch3lp/vol20-the-best-of-2020-part-one/ https://www.mixcloud.com/sch3lp/vol21-the-best-of-2020-part-two/ Technically the Laconic Hegmony mixtapes are hosted by mixcloud.com who provide the free widget above, an app for streaming on your smart phone or even using a website, (A website, can you imagine!) The reason I use mixcloud.com is they are free for everyone, (which is important), and also they use their advertising income to pay some royalties to the featured artists. I have bought the music from the artists already, I like the idea that the artist will make something from this randomly being played on the internet. Streaming income is not a lot of money, so if you hear something you like. buy it directly from the artists if you can. Side A****Song_Artist_1Four American DollarsUS GirlsUS2You Ain’t BigRufus WainwrightCAN3Brother sisterKevin MorbyCAN4Walking for a LivingWaterdeepUS5Closer & CloserTopsCAN6Faith Healer - Julien BakerJulian BakerUS7Head above WaterOrkestra MendozaUS8RunningGil Scott-HeronUS9Strange GirlLaura MarlingUK10ElevatorSmoke FairiesUK11BirdsThe Churchill GardenCHE12OpportunityKevin KrauterUS13The StepsHAIMUS14SurrenderWill ButlerUS15Sometimes He’s In My DreamsMary LattimoreUS16The Garbage MenHamilton LeithauserUS17BizarreJunioreFRA **Side BSong TitleArtist**1Now I don’t hate California after allCarly Rae JepsonUS2Invisible StringTaylor SwiftUS3Give/TakePorridge RadioUK4Pray up Stand upSAULTUK5You can’t Rule MeLucinda WilliamsUS6Wonder never CeaseJim WhiteUS7Garden SongPheobe BridgersUS8Hard on EveryoneKathleen EdwardsCAN9Cars in SpaceRolling Blackouts Coastal FeverAUS10I’ve Been DazedMichael KiwanukaUK11Tell YourselfRory ButlerUK12Roll Me Mama, Roll MeRay LaMontagneUK13ShamikaFiona AppleUS14ShiversIrmaUS15Hall of MirrorsBasia BulatCAN16Think About ThingsDaði FreyrISL17Better DistractionsFaye WebsterUS18BusinessWinston C.W.US19This BoatThe Innocence MissionUS

item.title: Looking back – The long list consisting of the Best Albums I heard in 2020
item.description: Here is the long list of the best music album of 2020. The rules are, it must be music I have heard for the first time within 2020, but the album does not need to have been released in 2020. No guarantee beyond this of anything but I that I liked the album. CanadaAlanis MorrisetteSuch pretty Forks in The RoadCanadaBadge Époque EnsembleSelf helpCanadaBasia BulatAre You In LoveUSAFiona AppleFetch the Bolt CuttersUSAFleet FoxesShoreUSAGillian Welch, David RawlingsAll the Good TimesUSAHamilton LeithauserThe Loves of Your LifeUSAIrmaThe DawnUSAJim WhiteMisfit’s JubileeFranceJunioreUn, Deux, TroisCanadaKathleen EdwardsTotal freedomUSAKevin KrauterFull HandUSALarkin PoeSelf Made ManUSALydia LovelessDautgherUKMicheal KiwanukaKIWANUKAUSAOrkesta MendozCuranderoUSAPhoebe BridgersPunisherUKRachel NewtonTo the AweUSARay LaMontagneMONOVISIONAustrailiaRolling Blackouts Coastal FeverSideways to new italyUKRory ButlerWindow ShoppingCanadaRufus WainwrightUnfollow The RulesUKSAULTUntitled (Black Is)UKSmoke FairiesDarkness brings The DawnUSATaylor SwiftFolkloreUSAThe Innocence MissionSee You TomorrowUSATim HeideckerFear of DeathCanadaTopsI Feel AliveUSAWaterdeepTandemUSAWill ButlerGenerationsUSAWinston C.W.Good GuessThe Longlist contains my albums of the year, but more of to come in a couple of days time. In the meantime I have created a giant Spotify list of most of the albums I heard for the first time in 2020. A few albums do not have coverage on Spotify for that I apologise. If you like an album please consider buying it from the artist. not just listening on Spotify. https://open.spotify.com/playlist/66ElYYyMkt0QPb7TrJpMvE?si=kZ1tKtWOQ2anvX6O-amT4w

item.title: "Decade" from Laconic Hegemony, side A (vol 17) & side B (vol 18), a #mixtape for you.
item.description:
The new Laconic Hegemony mixtape “Decade” is now out. Laconic hegemony is a small mixtape I put out with my favourite songs of the past year annually however, this is a new mixtape of some of my favourite songs from the past decade. You can listen to all, some or none of it. It is your choice. All these songs have been songs which have accompanied me over the decade of the 2010’s and mean something to me in some way. I am aware they do not currently mean anything to you hopefully that can change. Think of it as two sides of 1hr30mins of goodness to accompany your work rest and play! If you are so inclined, let me know what you like from the mixtapes. https://www.mixcloud.com/sch3lp/a-decade-of-song-side-a-vol17/ https://www.mixcloud.com/sch3lp/a-decade-of-song-side-b-vol18/ Technically the Laconic Hegmony mixtapes are hosted by mixcloud.com who provide the free widget above, an app for streaming on your smart phone or even using a website, (A website, can you imagine!) The reason I use mixcloud.com is they are free for everyone, (which is important), and also they use their advertising income to pay some royalties to the featured artists. I guess it is not a lot of money but I like the idea that the artist will make something from this randomly being played on the internet. Tracklist side A 1 Say hey, I love you - Michael Franti & Spearhead - USA
2 Into pieces - Alcoholic Faith Mission - Denmark
3 It’s eerie - Roses - USA
4 Four seconds - Barenaked Ladies - Canada
5 Bavarian porcelain - Sea Wolf - USA
6 Visa - MIA - UK/Sri Lanka
7 My dear machine - Sixpence None the Richer - USA
8 Gonna let my soul catch my body - Over the Rhine - USA
9 Beach blonde bottle blues - Larkin Poe - USA
10 Guilty party - The National - USA
11 Got to keep on - The Chemical Brothers - UK
12 Hello, I feel the same - The Innocence Mission - USA
13 The saints - Andy Mineo - USA
14 Almost had to start a fight / in and out of patience - Parquet Courts - USA
15 Pillar of truth - Lucy Dacus - USA
16 All poison - Sobs - Singapore
17 The places we have been - Lost Horizons - UK
18 Up on the hill where they do the boogie - Robert Ellis & Courtney Hartman - USA
19 Truth - Kamasi Washington - USA
20 Christmas at the airport - Nick Lowe - UK
21 Monument - MUTEMATH - USA
22 Dance for you - Dirty Projectors - USA
23 Runner - Dunes - USA Tracklist side B 1 I am a heart - Hey Ocean! - Canada
2 Can’t stop thinking about you - Tobias Jesso Jr - USA
3 Believe (nobody knows) - My Morning Jacket - USA
4 The brae - Yumi Zumi - New Zealand
5 Goliath - Steve Taylor and the Perfect Foil - USA
6 Chico’s radical decade - The GO! Team - UK
7 A beginning song - The Decemberists - USA
8 Silver kathrine - Damien Jurado - USA
9 Trouble - Tallies - Canada
10 Elevator operator - Courtney Barnett - Australia
11 Let it fall - Over the Rhine - USA
12 Simple song - The Shins - USA
13 Abandoned flesh - The Mountain Goats - USA
14 White dress - Dunes - New Zealand
15 The ghosts of beverly drive - Death Cab For Cutie - USA
16 Dusty trails - Lucius - USA
17 Slow burn - Leah Nobel - USA
18 Sick bug - Rolling Blackouts Coastal Fever - USA
19 Boomerang - Barenaked Ladies - Canada
20 The numbers - Radiohead - UK
21 Star roving - Slowdive - Uk
22 When the sun begins to shine - Micheal Franti & Spearhead - USA
23 God is love - The Innocence Mission - USA
